items.html: And know: although we say that this first Ibur [conception] was through the Zivug [coupling] of Arich, and the second Ibur, of the Mochin, was through the Zivug of AVI [Aba ve Ima] — the intent is this: in the first Ibur, the essence of the Zivug was in AA [Arich Anpin], for the reasons above; yet since the degree of AVI is greater than ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva], it is impossible for ZON to receive the illumination of AA except through them. Therefore, after the essence of the Zivug was made in AA, and the essential was drawn from there, afterwards a Zivug was made in AVI as well, and they received that existence which was made in the Zivug of Arich; and from them it was given to ZON, through their own Zivug as well.
